description: Copilot-compatible hook shim: inline critical hooks, soft-fail optional helper-script hooks.

hooks.command: bash -lc 'set -eo pipefail; ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || ROOT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || exit 0; SCRIPT="$ROOT/hooks/pre-bash-no-python.sh"; [ -f "$SCRIPT" ] || exit 0; exec bash "$SCRIPT"'

bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; INPUT=$(cat); PERMALINK=$(printf "%s" "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_response.permalink // .tool_result.permalink // empty" 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -z "$PERMALINK" ]; then RAW=$(printf "%s" "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_response // .tool_result // empty" 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$RAW" ]; then PERMALINK=$(printf "%s" "$RAW" | jq -r ".permalink // empty" 2>/dev/null || true); fi; fi; [ -n "$PERMALINK" ] || exit 0; case "$PERMALINK" in */schema/*) exit 0 ;; esac; jq -n --arg p "$PERMALINK" "{additionalContext: (\"A note was just written/edited (permalink: \" + \$p + \"). Call mcp__basic-memory__schema_validate with that identifier. If validation reports errors, surface them. If the note type has no schema or validation passes, do nothing.\")}"'

bash -lc 'set -eo pipefail; INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(printf "%s" "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null || true); [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] || exit 0; ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || ROOT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || exit 0; case "$FILE_PATH" in "$ROOT"/hooks/*.sh|"$ROOT"/scripts/*.sh) if command -v shfmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then DIFF=$(shfmt -d "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$DIFF" ]; then jq -n --arg diff "$DIFF" --arg f "$FILE_PATH" "{additionalContext: (\"shfmt detected formatting drift in \" + \$f + \":\\n\\n\" + \$diff + \\"\\n\\nAuto-fixed in place.\")}"; shfmt -w "$FILE_PATH"; exit 0; fi; fi ;; esac; case "$FILE_PATH" in "$ROOT"/schemas/*.md) BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE_PATH" .md); jq -n --arg b "$BASENAME" "{additionalContext: (\"Schema file edited: \" + \$b + \\". Remember to also update the corresponding Basic Memory schema note via edit_note (identifier: main/schema/\" + \$b + \\"), or use /schema-evolve for automated dual-sync.\")}" ;; esac'

bash -lc 'set -eo pipefail; ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || ROOT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || exit 0; SCRIPT="$ROOT/hooks/post-bm-failure-classify.sh"; [ -f "$SCRIPT" ] || exit 0; exec bash "$SCRIPT"'

bash -lc 'set -eo pipefail; ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || ROOT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || exit 0; SCRIPT="$ROOT/hooks/session-start.sh"; [ -f "$SCRIPT" ] || exit 0; exec bash "$SCRIPT"'
